tools.name: accounts.deleteAccountsId
tools.description: Deletes an account and all its data by ID, optionally merge scenarios into another account.

tools.name: accounts.getAccountsId
tools.description: Gets an account by its ID.

tools.name: accounts.getInstitutionsIdAccounts
tools.description: Lists accounts belonging to an institution by its ID.

tools.name: accounts.getUsersIdAccounts
tools.description: Lists all accounts belonging to the user by their ID.

tools.name: accounts.postUsersIdAccounts
tools.description: Creates and returns an account belonging to the user by their ID.

tools.name: accounts.putAccountsId
tools.description: Updates and returns an account by its ID.

tools.name: accounts.putUsersIdAccounts
tools.description: Updates the display order of accounts belonging to the user, by accepting an array of accounts in their new display order.

tools.name: attachments.deleteAttachmentsId
tools.description: Deletes a particular attachment by its ID.

tools.name: attachments.deleteTransactionsTransactionIdAttachmentsAttachmentId
tools.description: Unassigns a particular attachment by its ID from the transaction ID. This does not delete the attachment, it only removes its association from the transaction.

tools.name: attachments.getAttachmentsId
tools.description: Gets a particular attachment by its ID.

tools.name: attachments.getTransactionsIdAttachments
tools.description: Lists attachments belonging to a transaction by their ID.

tools.name: attachments.getUsersIdAttachments
tools.description: Lists attachments belonging to a user by their ID.

tools.name: attachments.postTransactionsIdAttachments
tools.description: Assigns an attachment to the transaction by their ID.

tools.name: attachments.postUsersIdAttachments
tools.description: Creates an attachment belonging to the user by their ID.

tools.name: attachments.putAttachmentsId
tools.description: Updates the title of the attachment.

tools.name: budgeting.deleteUsersIdForecastCache
tools.description: Delete the user's cached forecast by recalculating the forecast.

tools.name: budgeting.getUsersIdBudget
tools.description: Lists the user's budget, consisting of one or more budget analysis packages, one per category. Akin to the list on the Budget page in PocketSmith.

tools.name: budgeting.getUsersIdBudgetSummary
tools.description: Get the user's budget summary, containing an expense and income analysis for all categories (excluding transfer categories) for the given period and date range. Akin to the overall budget shown on the Budget page in PocketSmith.

tools.name: budgeting.getUsersIdTrendAnalysis
tools.description: Get an income and/or expense budget analysis for the given date range and period across any number of categories and scenarios. Akin to the Trends page in PocketSmith.

tools.name: categories.deleteCategoriesId
tools.description: Deletes a particular category by its ID. This will delete all budgets within the category, and uncategorize all transactions assigned to the category.

tools.name: categories.getCategoriesId
tools.description: Gets a particular category by its ID.

tools.name: categories.getUsersIdCategories
tools.description: Lists all categories belonging to a user by their ID.

tools.name: categories.postUsersIdCategories
tools.description: Creates a category belonging to the user by their ID.

tools.name: categories.putCategoriesId
tools.description: Updates a category by its ID.

tools.name: categoryRules.getUsersIdCategoryRules
tools.description: Lists all category rules belonging to a user by their ID.

tools.name: categoryRules.postCategoriesIdCategoryRules
tools.description: Creates a rule to allocate a category to transactions.

tools.name: currencies.getCurrencies
tools.description: Lists currencies supported by PocketSmith.

tools.name: currencies.getCurrenciesId
tools.description: Gets a particular currency by its ID.

tools.name: events.deleteEventsId
tools.description: Deletes an event by its ID.

tools.name: events.getEventsId
tools.description: Gets a particular event by its ID.

tools.name: events.getScenariosIdEvents
tools.description: Lists events belonging to a scenario by their ID.

tools.name: events.getUsersIdEvents
tools.description: Lists events belonging to a user by their ID.

tools.name: events.postScenariosIdEvents
tools.description: Creates an event in a scenario by its ID.

tools.name: events.putEventsId
tools.description: Updates an event by its ID.

tools.name: institutions.deleteInstitutionsId
tools.description: Deletes an institution and all data within. Alternatively, another institution can be provided to merge the data into to avoid losing it.

tools.name: institutions.getInstitutionsId
tools.description: Gets an institution by its ID.

tools.name: institutions.getUsersIdInstitutions
tools.description: Lists all the institutions belonging to the user.

tools.name: institutions.postUsersIdInstitutions
tools.description: Creates an institution belonging to a user.

tools.name: institutions.putInstitutionsId
tools.description: Updates the title and currency code for an institution.

tools.name: labels.getUsersIdLabels
tools.description: Lists labels belonging to a user by their ID.

tools.name: savedSearches.getUsersIdSavedSearches
tools.description: Lists saved searches belonging to a user by their ID.

tools.name: timeZones.getTimeZones
tools.description: Lists time zones.

tools.name: transactionAccounts.getTransactionAccountsId
tools.description: Gets a transaction account by its ID.

tools.name: transactionAccounts.getUsersIdTransactionAccounts
tools.description: List all transaction accounts belonging to a user.

tools.name: transactionAccounts.putTransactionAccountsId
tools.description: Updates the transaction account by its ID.

tools.name: transactions.deleteTransactionsId
tools.description: Deletes a transaction and all its data by ID.

tools.name: transactions.getAccountsIdTransactions
tools.description: Lists transactions belonging to an account by its ID.

tools.name: transactions.getCategoriesIdTransactions
tools.description: Lists transactions belonging to one or more categories by their IDs.

tools.name: transactions.getTransactionAccountsIdTransactions
tools.description: Lists transactions belonging to a transaction account by its ID.

tools.name: transactions.getTransactionsId
tools.description: Gets a transaction by its ID.

tools.name: transactions.getUsersIdTransactions
tools.description: Lists transactions belonging to a user by their ID.

tools.name: transactions.postTransactionAccountsIdTransactions
tools.description: Creates a transaction in a transaction account by its ID.

tools.name: transactions.putTransactionsId
tools.description: Updates a transaction by its ID.

tools.name: users.getMe
tools.description: Gets the user that corresponds to the access token used in the request.

tools.name: users.getUsersId
tools.description: Gets a user by ID. You must be authorised as the target user in order to make this request.

tools.name: users.putUsersId
tools.description: Updates the user by their ID. You must be authorised as the target user in order to make this request.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
